scripts.check:content: tsc --noEmit false --outDir node_modules/.cache/neon-requiem-content-check --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext src/checkContent.ts && node node_modules/.cache/neon-requiem-content-check/checkContent.js && node -e "import('node:fs').then((fs) => fs.rmSync('node_modules/.cache/neon-requiem-content-check', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
